highlights.title: Describe → Diagram
highlights.description: Tell the agent what you need — flowcharts, architectures, mind maps — and watch shapes and arrows appear on the canvas.

highlights.title: Hand-Drawn Style
highlights.description: Excalidraw's signature sketchy aesthetic makes diagrams feel approachable. Toggle roughness for clean or hand-drawn looks.

highlights.title: Select & Refine
highlights.description: Click any shape to select it — the agent sees what you picked (with a thumbnail). Say 'change this color' and it just works.
